fields.label: Phone
fields.name: contact_phone
fields.instructions: Main phone number shown in the utility bar and footer, e.g. (435) 586-2899.

fields.label: Email
fields.name: contact_email
fields.instructions: Main contact email shown in the utility bar and footer.

fields.label: Location (short)
fields.name: contact_location
fields.instructions: Short location shown in the utility bar, e.g. Cedar City, UT.

fields.label: Full Address
fields.name: contact_address
fields.instructions: Street address shown in the footer. One line per row.
